holdings.infoBox: BBCA is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are Royal Bank of Canada stock at 9.35%, The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 6.62%, SHOPIFY INC COMMON STOCK at 4.39%, Bank of Montreal at 3.99%, and Enbridge at 3.95%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders Canada ETF (BBCA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Canadian equities. BBCA was launched on Aug 7, 2018 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.text: Canada's economy unexpectedly shrank for a second consecutive quarter with a dip in activity to start the year as exports faltered but imports rose and weakness in business and government investment b...

data.title: Canada Inflation Heats Up to 2.8% in April
data.text: The acceleration was due largely to another month of steeper prices for gasoline, though core measures of inflation remain contained.

data.title: Bank of Canada on Alert for Quick Change in Inflation Dynamics, Minutes Say
data.text: Bank of Canada officials agreed on the need to change course quickly on rate policy depending on developments in the Middle East and trade tensions with the U.S.

data.title: Bank of Canada maintains rate at 2.25%, says Iran conflict and U.S. trade policy ‘are ongoing sources of uncertainty'
data.text: The Bank of Canada (BoC) maintained its key overnight rate at 2.25% on Wednesday, as expected, but warned that the outlook remains highly uncertain, with the Iran conflict and U.S. trade tariffs magni...

data.title: Bank of Canada Holds Policy Rate Steady, Expects Inflation to Peak in April
data.text: The Bank of Canada kept its main interest rate unchanged at 2.25%, and signaled the rate may stay close to that level so long as the economy evolves as forecast.

data.title: Canadian ETFs lose ground as Fitch cuts sovereign rating
data.text: Exchange-traded funds made up of Canadian securities slumped Wednesday in the wake of a sovereign debt downgrade.
